# Punto Reforma Alicante

> Architecture and total renovations in Alicante — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Alicante — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

## Contact

- Website: https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Alicante, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Alicante

## Blog Articles

- [Carpintería y reforma en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/carpinteria-pintura-iluminacion-alicante/): Custom carpentry, paint and lighting ideas for your renovation in Alicante: wardrobes, colours, finishes and light designed for the Mediterranean climate.
- [Elegir empresa de reformas Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/como-elegir-empresa-reformas-alicante/): Checklist for choosing a renovation company in Alicante: what to verify (licence, insurance, references) and red flags to avoid.
- [Errores en reformas en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/errores-comunes-reformas-alicante/): The most common renovation mistakes in Alicante and how to avoid them: unrealistic budgets, bad quotes, community issues and poor timing.
- [Reforma de baño en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-alicante/): Bathroom renovation prices in Alicante in 2026: costs, bath-to-shower conversion, waterproofing and what the community needs to approve.
- [Reforma de cocina en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-alicante/): Kitchen renovation prices in Alicante in 2026: costs by size, open-plan layouts, custom carpentry and realistic timelines.
- [Reforma integral en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-integral-alicante/): Complete renovation guide for Alicante: price per m², project phases, permits, timelines and what full project management covers.
- [Reformar para vender en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/reformar-para-vender-alquilar-alicante/): Which renovations genuinely add value to a property in Alicante for sale or rental, and what ROI to expect.
- [Reformas sostenibles en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/reformas-sostenibles-eficiencia-energetica-alicante/): How to renovate sustainably in Alicante: insulation, ventilation, efficient systems and available subsidies for energy-efficient works.
- [Tendencias de reforma en Alicante](https://alicante.puntoreforma.es/blog/tendencias-decoracion-interiorismo-alicante/): Interior design trends in Alicante for 2026: colours, materials and styles that work with the Mediterranean light and climate.
